Now, number four, when they actually give you a referral, I want you to ask them for an introduction rather than just contact information. See if you can get your client to actually introduce you through a letter, even better yet a phone call, it's going to have a lot more power than they just receive a blind phone call from you saying you referred to them by Mr. So-and-so. This gives you that much more credibility and of course your conversion rate will go up that much higher. And also it allows you to maintain some degree of control over what the client says about you and your product. So essentially you go into the conversation really having a good knowledge base of what this potential customer is about.
